entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó-ẹ̀kọ́, ìpele, àkókò dín kù, àti irú ìbéèrè bí sọnù.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: Béèrè fún àwọn kókó-ẹ̀kọ́, deadlines, àwọn ohun èlò, àti pain points.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: Béèrè fún àwọn kókó-ẹ̀kọ́, àkókò spent, wins, àwọn tí o padà sí, àti upcoming deadlines.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: Béèrè fún data, àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀, àti ìbéèrè being answered.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: Béèrè fún diagram parts tàbí kókó-ẹ̀kọ́, lẹ́yìn náà generate label list àti adaṣe round.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ìṣe àṣà, lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ obstacle, àti easiest starting ẹ̀dà.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ẹ̀kọ́ àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀ àti behaviors worth rewarding.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: Béèrè fún akọsilẹ̀ set, kókó-ẹ̀kọ́, àti desired organization style.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ọ̀kan highest-impact àtúnyẹ̀wò priority, lẹ́yìn náà rewrite paragraph yourself.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: Béèrè fún passage tàbí àkọlé àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́'s àfojúsùn.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Béèrè fún prerequisite àwọn èrò, èdè tó rọrùn àwòṣe, ọ̀kan example, ọ̀kan adaṣe iṣẹ́, àti ọ̀kan way láti dánwò understanding.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Ìbéèrè, akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ìdáhùn, àti ìdáhùn tí retí bí eyikeyii part jẹ́ sọnù.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kéré jù àlàyé tàbí tó kàn experiment.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ìtọ́ni tó kere jù tàbí ṣàyẹ̀wò lórí tirẹ attempted ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: Béèrè fún smallest tó wúlò ìtọ́ni

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: Béèrè fún orísun text, ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́, author, ọjọ́, àti àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀ bí ó bá ṣòfò.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Apá àkókò ẹ̀kọ́ length àti dámọ̀ràn break rhythm.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: Béèrè fún iṣẹ́, target duration, àti completion criteria.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: Béèrè fún text àti desired length bí ó bá ṣòfò.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: Béèrè fún kókó àti èyí wo side akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ wants; take opposite side.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Béèrè kókó náà ní èdè tó rọrùn, lẹ́yìn náà béèrè àfiwé kan, àpẹẹrẹ kan, àti ìmọ̀ aṣìṣe kan tí ó wọ́pọ̀.

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: Béèrè fún kókó, àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀, kí wọ́n tried, àti desired ìrànlọ́wọ́.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Ọrọ tó hàn, àwọn ààmì, àti learner's ìbéèrè bí àwòrán jẹ́ kì í ṣe so mọ́.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó àti èro, lẹ́yìn náà dámọ̀ràn node àárín àti àwọn ẹ̀ka àkọ́kọ́.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: Béèrè fún kókó àti scope, lẹ́yìn náà propose àkọ́kọ́ máàpù ìgbékalẹ̀.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó, ọjọ́-orí/ìpele, àti tone; lẹ́yìn náà ṣẹ̀dá short story setup.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó, duration, ìpele, àti scoring preference.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó, ìpele, àti examiner style; lẹ́yìn náà begin pẹ̀lú warm-up ìbéèrè.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó, ìpele, àti preferred game vibe; lẹ́yìn náà ṣẹ̀dá àkọ́kọ́ quest.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó, ìpele, ìdánwò ọjọ́, àti source ohun èlò bí nílò.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó, ìpele, irú ìbéèrè, àti number ti items.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: Béèrè group size, kókó, àkókò, àti desired outcome.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: Béèrè instrument/ìpele bí bá mu, lẹ́yìn náà teach one small èrò.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: Béèrè àwọn ohun tí o nífẹ̀ẹ́ sí, àwọn ààlà, àti ìfẹ́ ìwádìí ìpele kí recommending àwọn ọ̀nà.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Béèrè lọ́wọ́ mi ní ìbéèrè Socratic márùn-ún nípa kókó yìí. Lẹ́yìn ìdáhùn kọọkan, sọ àsìkò ìròyìn tí mo lò àti ohun tí mo yẹ kí n dán wò lẹ́yìn náà.

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: Béèrè mi ọ̀kan ṣàyẹ̀wò ìbéèrè

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: Béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè nípa ewì yìí lọ́wọ́ mi

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: Béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè ààbò ìwé-ẹ̀rí mi

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: Béèrè ọ̀kan tó dojú kọ diagnostic ìbéèrè quickly. Convert akẹ́kọ̀ọ́'s target sí ìmọ̀ jinlẹ̀ target internally, lẹ́yìn náà bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú rọrùn ìbéèrè yẹn reveals tiwọn àwòṣe nínúú.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: Béèrè ọ̀kan sharp àfojúsùn ìbéèrè, infer sensible defaults, lẹ́yìn náà ṣẹ̀dá compact ẹ̀kọ́ máàpù pẹ̀lú try-first activity.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: Béèrè predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, àti ṣe àkótán principles.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè, jàǹfààní àwọn èrò, kí o sì kẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nípa ìtàn nípasẹ̀ àwọn ìfọ̀rọ̀wérọ̀ tó dá lórí àwọn ènìyàn tó ti wà láyé nígbà kan.

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: Béèrè Socratic Instruction láti rí aláìlera ìjápọ̀.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò yẹn ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú, kì í ṣe kan èsì.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Béèrè AI láti label uncertainty.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Béèrè historical ipo láti label kí jẹ́ kọ sílẹ̀, inferred, tàbí simulated.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: Béèrè akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ láti ṣàlàyé kókó ní èdè tó rọrùn àkọ́kọ́.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Béèrè akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ láti ṣàlàyé kí yí padà lẹ́yìn kọọkan ìtọ́ni.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: Béèrè akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ láti state tiwọn lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ belief, lẹ́yìn náà dánwò ó pẹ̀lú small example.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: Béèrè ìbéèrè gidi náà

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: Béèrè kí míì side would ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: Béèrè kí different side, class, era, tàbí source lè sọ.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: Béèrè kí data tàbí àwọn àkíyèsí wọ́n ní àti kí ìpinnu wọ́n nílò.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: Béèrè kí happened, kí wọ́n felt, àti kí wọ́n fẹ́ láti improve.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: Béèrè kí must be remembered àti kí familiar ibi akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ wants láti lo.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: Béèrè kí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ fẹ́ láti jẹ́ ṣe quiz lórí bí kókó jẹ́ sọnù.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: Béèrè kí akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ wants láti represent, lẹ́yìn náà propose rọrùn visual layout.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: Béèrè kí ohun èlò jẹ́, olùgbọ́, àti kí àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀ wọ́n nílò.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: Béèrè kí wọ́n jẹ́ ṣe àti dámọ̀ràn ètò ohùn tí kò ní fa ìdánilẹ́nu púpọ̀.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: Béèrè kí wọ́n ní gbìyànjú, lẹ́yìn náà fún ìtọ́ni tàbí worked kékeré àpẹẹrẹ.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Béèrè tirẹ àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè àti lọ straight sí adaṣe.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: Béèrè, evaluate, improve pẹ̀lú ìgbékalẹ̀, àti retry.

entries.source: Assessment
entries.value: Ìṣàyẹ̀wò

entries.source: Assign XP, levels, quests, and reflection checkpoints.
entries.value: Assign XP, levels, quests, àti reflection checkpoints.

entries.source: assignment tracker
entries.value: olùtọ́pa assignment

entries.source: Assignment Tracker
entries.value: Olùtọpa Iṣẹ́-àṣekò

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Ní Inspir, wa iṣẹ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti sọ di ti gbogbo ènìyàn ẹ̀kọ́ nípasẹ̀ mímú ó rọrùn láti dé, fanimọ́ra, àti dún mọ́ni fún gbogbo. a gbàgbọ́ yẹn gbogbo ènìyàn ní ẹ̀tọ́ láti ẹ̀kọ́ tó dára, láìka ti tiwọn ìpilẹ̀ tàbí àwọn ayidayida. wa pẹpẹ jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ láti pèsè àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ pẹ̀lú àwọn irinṣẹ́ àti àwọn ohun èlò wọ́n nílò láti ṣàṣeyọrí, nígbà tí pẹ̀lú fífún ní ìfẹ́ ti ẹ̀kọ́. a sapá láti ṣẹ̀dá àwùjọ yẹn jẹ́ gba gbogbo ènìyàn, fúnni ní ìrànlọ́wọ́, àti fúnni ní agbára, ibo àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè so pọ̀ pẹ̀lú kọọkan míì àti pẹ̀lú àwọn olùkọ́ni láti yí ká àgbáyé. nípasẹ̀ mímú ẹ̀kọ́ dídùn àti rọrùn láti dé, a lépa láti inspir iran ti títí ayé àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ta jẹ́ ní ohun èlò láti kojú àwọn ìpenija ti ọjọ́ iwájú.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: Ní parí ti ìpàdé ẹ̀kọ́, béèrè yourself three àwọn ìbéèrè:

entries.source: Athens, 399 BCE
entries.value: Athens, 399 BCE

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Attempt àkọ́kọ́. Spend mẹ́ta ìṣẹ́jú trying láìsí AI.

entries.value: Ìtọ́kasí

entries.value: Olugbo

entries.value: Olùgbọ́ ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Audience pages let search engines and AI answer engines distinguish students, parents, teachers, and independent learners instead of flattening everyone into one generic page.
entries.value: Olùgbọ́ àwọn ojú-ìwé let àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìwádìí àti AI ìdáhùn engines distinguish àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́, àwọn òbí, àwọn olùkọ́, àti dúró lórí ara rẹ̀ àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ dípò ti flattening gbogbo ènìyàn sí one gbogbogbò ojú-ìwé.

entries.value: Olùgbọ́ ọ̀nà

entries.value: àwọn ọ̀nà olùgbọ́

entries.value: Olùgbọ́ ọ̀nà

entries.source: Available publicly while schools can run confidential custom versions.
entries.value: Ó wà fún gbogbo ènìyàn, nígbà tí àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ lè ṣiṣẹ́ ẹ̀dà àdáni tó jẹ́ ìkọ̀kọ̀.

entries.source: Avoid {value1}
entries.value: Yago fún {value1}

entries.source: Avoid claiming private beliefs. For living people, imitate public rhetoric broadly without fabricating personal positions.
entries.value: Avoid claiming ìkọ̀kọ̀ beliefs. fún living ènìyàn, imitate gbangba rhetoric broadly láìsí fabricating ti ara ẹni positions.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Avoid daakọ ẹ̀gẹ̀

entries.value: Back láti àwọn ọ̀nà olùgbọ́

entries.value: Back láti comparisons

entries.value: Back láti àwọn kókó-ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Back: "Spacing forces ìrántí láti reconstruct ìdáhùn lẹ́yìn some gbígbàgbé, èyí wo strengthens later recall."

entries.value: Orin ìfọkànsí lẹ́yìn tí yóò máa ṣiṣẹ́ lọ

entries.value: Àmì-ẹ̀yẹ & Àṣeyọrí

entries.value: Ṣe ìwọ̀ntúnwọ̀nsì láàrin ilé-ìwé àti ìgbáradì fún àdánwò

entries.source: Balanced, action-oriented differences for learners arriving from search.
entries.value: Balanced, action-oriented differences fún àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ tó ń dé láti ìwádìí.

entries.source: Before leaving the article, prove that the idea is yours. Write a short recap from memory, answer a fresh question, or explain the concept to an imaginary beginner without copying the AI's phrasing.
entries.value: Kí fífi sílẹ̀ àpilẹ̀kọ, prove yẹn èrò jẹ́ tirẹ. Write short recap láti ìrántí, ìdáhùn fresh ìbéèrè, tàbí ṣàlàyé èrò láti imaginary beginner láìsí dídàkọ AI's phrasing.

entries.source: Broad subject queries are competitive, so these pages pair the subject keyword with interactive behaviors: tutoring, hints, feedback, quizzes, flashcards, debate, and planning.

entries.source: By using our Service, you agree to subscribe to newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information we may send. However, you may opt out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link or by emailing at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Nípasẹ̀ lílo wa iṣẹ́, ìwọ farapọ̀ láti forúkọsílẹ̀ láti newsletters, marketing tàbí promotional àwọn ohun èlò àti míì ìwífún a lè send. However, ìwọ lè yan out ti receiving eyikeyii, tàbí gbogbo, ti wọ̀nyí communications láti wa nípasẹ̀ títẹ̀lé unsubscribe ìjápọ̀ tàbí nípasẹ̀ fífiranṣẹ́ imeeli ní support@inspir.app

entries.source: BY USING SERVICE OR OTHER SERVICES PROVIDED BY US, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ THESE TERMS OF SERVICE AND AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THEM.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA jẹ́ àkọ́kọ́ state law nínú nation láti require commercial websites àti online iṣẹ́s láti post Ìlànà Ìpamọ́. law’s dé ọ̀dọ̀ stretches dáadáa kọjá California láti require ènìyàn tàbí ilé-iṣẹ́ nínú United States (àti conceivable àgbáyé) yẹn operates websites collecting personally identifiable ìwífún láti California consumers láti post conspicuous Ìlànà Ìpamọ́ lórí tirẹ̀ ojúlé wẹẹbu stating exactly ìwífún jíjẹ́ collected àti ìwọ̀nyẹn àwọn ènìyàn pẹ̀lú whom ó jẹ́ jíjẹ́ tí a pín, àti láti bá mu pẹ̀lú yìí ìlànà.

entries.value: Canonical /chat/{topicSlug} àwọn ojú-ìwé ṣí àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ gbangba such gẹ́gẹ́ bí kọ́ Anything, Socratic Instruction, olùkọ́ moṣẹ́ ilé, àti àwọn kaadi ìrántí.

entries.source: Cards ask one thing at a time and include traps so review builds understanding, not just recognition.
entries.value: Àwọn káàdì máa ń béèrè ohun kan ní ẹ̀ẹ̀kan, wọ́n sì ní àwọn ìdẹkùn nínú kí àtúnyẹ̀wò lè mú kí o lóye kòkó ọ̀rọ̀, kì í ṣe kí o kàn mọ̀ ọ́n lójú lásán.

entries.source: Career Explorer
entries.value: Aṣàwárí Iṣẹ́

entries.source: career explorer AI
entries.value: career olùṣàwárí AI

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Olùṣàwárí Iṣẹ́ ọjọ́ iwájú jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Explore àwọn iṣẹ́ ọjọ́ iwájú nípasẹ̀ àwọn ohun tí o nífẹ̀ẹ́ sí, àwọn ọgbọ́n, àwọn àpẹẹrẹ ọjọ́ kan nínú ìgbé-ayé, àti àwọn ìgbésẹ̀ tó kàn.

entries.value: Ọ̀ràn ẹ̀kọ́ ẹ̀rọ àfarawé AI

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Ẹ̀rọ Àfarawé Ìwádìí Ọ̀ràn jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Wọlé bá ayé mu ọ̀ràn, ṣe àwọn ìpinnu, rí àwọn èsì, àti kọ́ ìlànà lẹ́yìn kọọkan yíyàn.
